description.value:
Send Prescription processing vma-vervangend-middel building blocks for patient J. van de XXX_Knaap
For more info: https://informatiestandaarden.nictiz.nl/wiki/mp:V3.0.0_testgegevens_afhandelen_voorschrift_sturen
Original description: TEST Scenarioset 23.4a afhandelen voorschrift t.b.v. VMA <span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full xforms-visited" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group xforms-visited" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙21"><span class="xforms-group xforms-group-appearance-full" id="main-ui"><span class="xforms-group" id="xf-103"><span class="fr-accordion-lnf xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡fr-accordion-group"><span class="xforms-group" id="main-accordion≡xf-177⊙16">TEST Scenarioset 23.4a afhandelen voorschrift voor akkoord VMA t.b.v. Vervangend middel VMA
Send Prescription processing vma-vervangend-middel resources in a transaction Bundle
Test client to POST a Bundle of type transaction.
